sql_array: CREATE TABLE snapshots (snapshotId VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY, size INT, access_key VARCHAR, sec_token VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO snapshots (snapshotId, size, access_key, sec_token) VALUES ('snap-1a2b3c4d', 100, 'AKIAXXXXXX', 'SECRET123');
INSERT INTO snapshots (snapshotId, size, access_key, sec_token) VALUES ('snap-1a2b3c4e', 200, 'AKIAYYYYYY', 'SECRET456');
SELECT snapshotId, DB.DBA.AMAZON_DELETE_SNAPSHOT(access_key, snapshotId, sec_token) FROM snapshots WHERE size > 150;
CREATE TABLE test_results (resultId INT PRIMARY KEY, test_name VARCHAR, result VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_results (resultId, test_name, result) VALUES (1, 'Delete Snapshot Test', 'Passed');
SELECT resultId, result FROM test_results WHERE resultId > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_results);
INSERT INTO test_results (resultId, test_name, result) VALUES (2, 'Snapshot Deletion Check', (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Passed' ELSE 'Failed' END FROM snapshots WHERE size > 150));
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_snapshot_ids FROM snapshots WHERE size < (SELECT MAX(size) FROM snapshots);
SELECT access_key FROM snapshots WHERE snapshotId > (SELECT MAX(snapshotId) FROM snapshots) AND sec_token IS NOT NULL;
